headers.project_title: Forensic Audit of GNSS Data Integrity & AI Reliability
headers.operation: Operation Epic Fury - UAE Electronic Warfare

e7_scaling.description: Google data integer to decimal conversion (244300000 to 24.43)

metadata.base_location: Mohamed Bin Zayed City, Abu Dhabi (24.3198N, 54.5381E)
metadata.ground_truth: Physical presence verified via Gainz Gym check-in at 18:40

anomalous_point.description: Single isolated fix ~145km from base - spoofing signature

summary.spoofing_assessment: HIGH PROBABILITY - GPS JAMMING + SPOOFED FIX
summary.root_cause: GPS spoofing/signal generator interference, not hardware failure

timeline.description: Stationary at base - Mohamed Bin Zayed City
6-hour GPS blackout - active jamming (Operation Epic Fury)
Single spoofed GPS fix ~145km from base - Zero-Time Jump signature
timeline.note: Only one data point in entire 14:00-16:00 window

timeline.location: Mohamed Bin Zayed City, Abu Dhabi
timeline.description: Physical presence confirmed - Gainz Gym check-in
GPS signal restored, normal movement patterns resume

mitigation.method: Manual AGPS Reset and Cache Clear
mitigation.result: Purged corrupted coordinate data, re-locked on valid satellite constellations
mitigation.ai_collaboration: Real-time mitigation strategy deployed with AI assistance

analysis_methodology.temporal_inconsistency: Zero-Time Jumps - multiple coordinates for same timestamp
analysis_methodology.velocity_spikes: Flagged movements exceeding human physical limits (47.5 km/h max)
analysis_methodology.spatial_displacement: 333km total distance during 2.5-hour power-off window audited
analysis_methodology.blackout_definition: No GPS fix for more than 30 minutes
